rules.sigma:
title: LSASS Memory Dump via comsvcs.dll
id: a1b2c3d4-1111-2222-3333-444455556666
status: stable
description: Detects credential dumping from LSASS memory using rundll32 and comsvcs.dll MiniDump.
author: SOC Prime Team
tags:
  - attack.credential_access
  - attack.t1003.001
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\rundll32.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'comsvcs.dll'
      - 'MiniDump'
  condition: selection
level: critical

title: Scheduled Task Creation via schtasks
id: b2c3d4e5-1111-2222-3333-444455556666
status: experimental
description: Detects creation of a scheduled task, frequently abused for persistence.
author: SOC Prime Team
tags:
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.t1053.005
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\schtasks.exe'
    CommandLine|contains: ' /create '
  condition: selection
level: medium
